## Checklist

- [ ] SQL uses prepared statements; output is escaped with `h()`.
- [ ] CSRF tokens present on any new/changed forms.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data committed.
- [ ] Stays XAMPP‑friendly (no Composer/Node/build step added).
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed.
